creator: curtis@ipv6.occnc.com
text:
(In reply to Zhenlei Huang from comment #4)

The problem did not go away if using dhcp6c, I just gave up on using dhcp6c.
I'm using dhcpcd with 14.1-STABLE built on 20240809 (uname -K == 1401502,
uname -b == 9b4e712570e7411c0f58d3b8455ecf462ec91846).

I also changed providers.  dhcp6c didn't work with spectrum (aka charter) and didn't work with starlink either.  I was running dhcp6c with a back revision of 14 stable until switched to starlink and did a dhcpcd config and gave up on dhcp6c.

Perhaps this bug should be reported in ports against dhcp6c.  I did not look at where in the code dhcp6c was not getting a response.
